title: TSI Accessory Group,Stanley Creations Inc, iStar Jewelry, Roman & Sunstone. ransomware incident

victim.name: TSI Accessory Group,Stanley Creations Inc, iStar Jewelry, Roman & Sunstone.

extortion.description: We are going to upload about 35 gb of essential corporate documents of a bunch of companies. You will find in the archives: financial data (audit, payment details,financial reports, invoices), employees and customers information (passports, Social Security Numbers, medical information, emails, phones) confidential information and other documents with detailed personal information so on.
